title: Existencia
description: Decir que algo existe, está o no está.

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: There is a library next to our classroom.
items.translation: Hay una biblioteca junto a nuestro salón.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L15-01 - E1151 - Emma - There is a library next to our classroom.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L15-02 - E1152 - Ethan - Are there many books.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L15-04 - E1154 - Mia - There are also computers.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Is there a place to study?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L15-05 - E1155 - Ethan - Is there a place to study.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L26-03 - E1263 - Ethan - There are five rooms.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L26-04 - E1264 - Noah - Is there a garden.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Yes, there is a small garden.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L26-05 - E1265 - Ethan - Yes, there is a small garden.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L13-02 - E2132 - Mia - There aren't enough tables.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.translation: El público todavía no está aquí.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L29-04 - E2294 - Ethan - The audience isn't here yet.mp3

items.speaker: Nora
items.translation: No hay problema. Maneja con cuidado.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L10-06 - BR1106 - Nora - No problem. Drive safely.mp3

items.speaker: Ben
items.text: There's a new food market downtown.
items.translation: Hay un mercado de comida nuevo en el centro.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L13-03 - BR1133 - Ben - There's a new food market downtown.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: Probably not. There are many entries.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L18-02 - BR1182 - Leo - Probably not. There are many entries.mp3

items.speaker: Ben
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L23-03 - BR1233 - Ben - Is something wrong with it.mp3
